validFixtures.description: Alpha vertical proof manifest tying public fixture identity, bridge units, runtime targets, artifacts, provider proof ids, benchmark outputs, and content hashes.
Benchmark, cost, QA-agent, human evaluation, and finding rollup report.
Full bridge bundle covering dialogue, UI, database, song, image text, and metadata surfaces.
Compatibility report for the committed contract fixture suite.
Manifest consumed by TypeScript and Rust fixture validation.
Delta metadata tracing a package back to bridge source revision and patch export hash.
Standalone finding record with same-finding evidence provenance.
Patch export with source revisions and protected span mappings.
Patch result with explicit source compatibility details.
Patch result proving bridge unit id mismatches are incompatible even when source hashes match.
Runtime evidence with trace, branch, capture, and recording artifact references.
Triage events, tasks, findings, evidence, provenance, and causal links.

invalidFixtures.description: Alpha proof manifests must not reference raw private-local corpus paths.
Patch refs must resolve to an asset in the asset policy bundle.
LLM QA provider runs must be covered by QA-agent evaluations.
Bridge units must reference known bridge assets.
Bridge hashes must be canonical lowercase SHA-256 strings.
v0.1 bridge payloads must route through legacy guards.
Delta metadata source revisions must trace the cited source bundle hash.
Findings must carry evidence instead of confidence-only claims.
Patch export entries must be unique by bridge unit and source unit key.
Patch results cannot carry an incompatible source report unless the top-level status says so.
The local user fixture must include every MVP permission grant.
Runtime evidence tier cannot exceed the declared fidelity tier.
Controlled playback session status must match the persisted runtime report status.

invalidFixtures.expectedSemanticError: requestedOperation trace must not carry capture evidence
invalidFixtures.description: Trace-requested controlled playback sessions cannot carry capture evidence.

invalidFixtures.expectedSemanticError: provenanceIds\[0\] must reference provenance in TriageBundleV02
invalidFixtures.description: Triage finding evidence must reference known provenance.
